name: symphony-plus-plus-mcp
description: Full Symphony++ MCP-backed planning, WorkPackage, and architect workflows for dedicated Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Opt-in Symphony++ MCP orchestration for dedicated Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Use this opt-in plugin for dedicated Symphony++ MCP sessions. It includes the baseline Solo, worker, and coordinator skills plus architect and WorkPackage workflows. On Codex startup it launches or reuses the local Symphony++ backend and dashboard, then bridges MCP over the local HTTP endpoint. Generic, review, and non-MCP planning sessions should use the default skill-only Symphony++ plugin instead.
